targets.query:
SELECT metric_timestamp AS time, SUM(metric_value) AS value 
FROM metrics 
WHERE metric_name = 'scraper_executions_total' 
AND $__timeFilter(metric_timestamp) 
GROUP BY time 
ORDER BY time ASC;

SELECT metric_timestamp AS time, 
  (SUM(CASE WHEN tags->>'status' = 'success' THEN metric_value ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(metric_value)) AS success_percentage 
FROM metrics 
WHERE metric_name = 'scraper_executions_total' 
AND $__timeFilter(metric_timestamp) 
GROUP BY time 
ORDER BY time ASC;

SELECT metric_timestamp AS time, AVG(metric_value) AS avg_quality_score 
FROM metrics 
WHERE metric_name = 'data_quality_score' AND tags->>'entity_type' LIKE '%scraper%' 
AND $__timeFilter(metric_timestamp) 
GROUP BY time 
ORDER BY time ASC;

panels.title: System CPU Usage (%)

targets.query:
SELECT metric_timestamp AS time, AVG(metric_value) AS avg_cpu_usage 
FROM metrics 
WHERE metric_name = 'system_cpu_usage' 
AND $__timeFilter(metric_timestamp) 
GROUP BY time 
ORDER BY time ASC;

panels.description: Average system-wide CPU usage. May not be scraper-specific unless on dedicated infrastructure.

panels.title: System Memory Usage (%)

targets.query:
SELECT metric_timestamp AS time, AVG(metric_value) AS avg_memory_usage 
FROM metrics 
WHERE metric_name = 'system_memory_usage' 
AND $__timeFilter(metric_timestamp) 
GROUP BY time 
ORDER BY time ASC;

panels.description: Average system-wide Memory usage. May not be scraper-specific.
